payload.title: Render mermaid diagrams in ticket descriptions
payload.description: When a ticket description contains a fenced code block tagged 'mermaid', render it as a diagram instead of showing source. Mermaid lib is lazy-loaded from CDN (cdn.jsdelivr.net) on demand — only when a description actually contains a mermaid fence. Offline fallback: show the source as a normal code block with a 'mermaid (offline)' note. Diagrams re-render when the description is edited (in the live preview).
